faqItems.a: No. We only provide technical integration support and an online guided onboarding flow.
Transactions are executed by regulator-licensed payment service channels.

faqItems.q: Can I use it without technical knowledge?
faqItems.a: No technical knowledge is needed — the system guides you automatically.

faqItems.q: Do I have to use the API?
faqItems.a: No. The API is optional and only needed if you want deep integration into your own system.

compliance: We provide technical integration and process support services, including an online entry point, automated guidance, and API support. Related services are provided by licensed institutions and comply with local regulations.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: This platform (QRHub) values the protection of user information and complies with applicable data protection laws and regulations.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content:
We may collect the following information:

• Basic information (such as name and contact details)
• Business information (such as merchant name and business details)
• Usage information (such as access logs and operation behavior)

sections.title: 2. How We Use Information
sections.content:
The information we collect is used only for:

• Providing integration and process guidance services
• Improving the system experience
• User support and issue handling

sections.title: 3. Information Sharing
sections.content:
We do not sell user information.

Information may be provided to third parties in the following cases:

• Partner institutions required to complete the integration process
• As required by laws and regulations

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We take reasonable measures to protect information security and prevent unauthorized access or disclosure.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content:
Users may at any time:

• Check or update information
• Request data deletion

sections.title: 6. Nature of Service
sections.content: This platform provides only technical integration and process support services and does not involve any fund handling or execution services.

sections.title: 7. Policy Updates
sections.content: We may update this policy and publish the latest version on this page.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.content: If you have any questions, please contact us:

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: By using this platform, you agree to the following terms.

sections.title: 1. Service Scope
sections.content: This platform provides technical integration and process support services to assist users in completing the integration process.

sections.title: 2. User Responsibilities
sections.content:
Users must ensure:

• The information provided is true and accurate
• Compliance with local laws and regulations

sections.title: 3. Third-Party Services
sections.content:
Some features involve services provided by third-party institutions.

Such services are the responsibility of those institutions, and this platform does not participate in their execution.

sections.title: 4. Limitation of Liability (Key)
sections.content:
This platform is not liable for the following:

• Actions of third-party services
• User operations or information errors
• Issues beyond the platform’s control

sections.title: 5. Service Changes
sections.content: We reserve the right to adjust or update service content.

sections.title: 6. Nature of Service
sections.content: This platform provides only technical support and process services and does not provide fund handling or related services.
